name: Amazon VPC
description: Represents an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) with its associated configuration, networking, and metadata.

properties.name: vpcId
properties.description: The unique identifier for the VPC

properties.name: cidrBlock
properties.description: The primary IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC

properties.name: state
properties.description: The current state of the VPC

properties.name: dhcpOptionsId
properties.description: The ID of the set of DHCP options associated with the VPC

properties.name: instanceTenancy
properties.description: The allowed tenancy of instances launched into the VPC

properties.name: isDefault
properties.description: Indicates whether the VPC is the default VPC

properties.name: ownerId
properties.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the VPC

properties.name: cidrBlockAssociationSet
properties.description: Information about the IPv4 CIDR blocks associated with the VPC

properties.name: ipv6CidrBlockAssociationSet
properties.description: Information about the IPv6 CIDR blocks associated with the VPC

properties.name: internetGateways
properties.description: Internet gateways attached to the VPC

properties.name: routeTables
properties.description: Route tables associated with the VPC

properties.name: networkAcls
properties.description: Network ACLs associated with the VPC
